description_long: This armchair features a semi-circular, wraparound backrest and armrests, all upholstered in dark brown, slightly glossy leather with visible creases and subtle tufting. The seat is generously padded, matching the backrest in both material and color, and is bordered by a wooden frame that adds structural support and visual contrast. The armrests are integrated into the curved back, with metal rivets accentuating the connection points for added durability and style. The rear of the chair is fully enclosed with a smooth, dark wood panel, giving it a solid and substantial appearance from behind. The base is open at the front and sides, supported by sturdy wooden legs that are slightly inset, providing stability while maintaining a refined silhouette. This design is both classic and robust, suitable for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, lounges, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A semi-circular, dark brown leather armchair with a wraparound backrest, wooden frame, and integrated armrests accented by metal rivets. The seat and back are padded and tufted, with a fully enclosed wooden rear panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded leather seat, curved backrest, and integrated armrests with metal rivet details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, curved backrest, padded seat, and the open space beneath the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous wooden panel that fully encloses the back of the chair.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curvature of the backrest and the open base structure.
attribute_armrest_design: curved, padded, and upholstered in leather with visible metal rivets
attribute_backrest_style: semi-circular, medium height, padded and tufted with leather upholstery
attribute_leg_type: short, inset wooden legs, partially visible at the base
